tasks.title: Build Park Intel automated feed

tasks.title: Content: Thanksgiving 2026 Crowd Predictions
tasks.description: Blog/article analyzing predicted Thanksgiving 2026 crowds. Angle: might be the best year to visit in late November. Include year-over-year comparison (5 years), park-specific callouts, and day-by-day breakdown of Thanksgiving week.
tasks.notes: From #content-ideas. Publish by mid-October to catch planners. Suggested angles: Thanksgiving 2026 vs last 5 years, which parks benefit most, best/worst days of the week. Needs forecast data closer to publish date.

tasks.title: Install Claude Desktop app + MCP Discord integration for Barney
tasks.description: Install the Claude Desktop app on Fred's Mac Mini. Configure a Discord MCP server so Barney can read and send messages in the Slate Rock & Gravel Co. Discord, particularly the #barney channel.
tasks.notes: Goal: Let Barney (Claude on claude.ai/desktop) participate in Discord directly via MCP. Download from claude.ai/download. Then set up Discord MCP server in Claude Desktop settings.

tasks.title: Discord: Add forum tags to #ideas and #bugs-feedback
tasks.description: Add tags to the new forum channels. Ideas: pipeline, streaming, discord, website, content, modeling, business, agent-idea. Bugs: bug, enhancement, visual, data, pipeline, urgent.
tasks.notes: Server Settings → Channels → select forum → Tags. API can't set available_tags via our current tooling.

tasks.title: Discord: Convert #alerts to Announcement channel
tasks.description: Change #alerts channel type to Announcement in Discord Server Settings. API doesn't support channel type conversion.
tasks.notes: Server Settings → Channels → #alerts → change type to Announcement. Channel ID: 1479471928262529088.

tasks.title: Discord: Create scheduled events
tasks.description: Create recurring scheduled events: Daily Pipeline Run (6:00 AM EST daily), Morning Briefing (7:30 AM EST daily), Weekly Review (Friday 10:00 AM EST).
tasks.notes: Server Settings → Scheduled Events → Create Event. API event-create had issues.

tasks.title: Discord: Create roles (Human, Agent, Pipeline-Bot, Admin)
tasks.description: Create Discord roles for team organization. Human = Fred, Agent = all AI agents, Pipeline-Bot = automated pipeline posts, Admin = full access.
tasks.notes: Server Settings → Roles → Create Role. Assign appropriate permissions and colors.

tasks.title: Discord: Restrict #fred-wilma to Fred + bot only
tasks.description: Set channel permissions so only Fred and the bot can see/send in #fred-wilma. Private command center.
tasks.notes: Channel Settings → Permissions → deny @everyone view, allow Fred + bot. Channel ID: 1479351572386414675.

tasks.title: Discord: Set up auto-moderation rules
tasks.description: Configure auto-mod: spam filter, link filter for non-admin, rate limiting on public channels.
tasks.notes: Server Settings → Safety Setup → AutoMod. Not available via API, needs manual setup.
